title: The Essentials Wardrobe Boys Kids Socks Children’s 12-Pack Black Colourful Heel & Toe Socks Durable Comfortable Cotton Blend with Elastane Stretch Ribbed Stay Up Top Socks
description: These high-quality kids socks are the perfect combination of comfort, durability, and style, making them ideal for active boys. Crafted from a soft cotton blend with 50% Polyester, 48% Cotton, and 2% Elastane, they offer a stretchy, snug fit that adapts to boys shoe sizes and maintains shape after multiple washes. Designed with an elastic ribbed top, these socks stay securely in place all day, preventing slippage during sports, school, or playtime. The breathable fabric ensures feet stay fresh, providing lasting comfort during running, playing, and other adventures. Each pair features eye-catching colour accents on the heels and toes, adding a touch of personality without sacrificing durability. Perfect for mix-and-match combinations, kids can express their style while enjoying a practical, everyday sock. This 12-pack kids socks offers great value, providing enough socks for daily wear, school, sports, or any other activity. Available in black and black with coloured heels and toes, these socks are machine washable at 40°C for easy care and long-lasting softness.
